title: Luxury Memory Foam Bath Mat Set 2 Piece – Non Slip Pebble Bathroom Rug & Pedestal Mat, Quick Dry Ultra Absorbent Soft Cushioned Mats 100% Polyester (Cream)
features: LUXURY MEMORY FOAM COMFORT: Step onto plush memory foam that cushions every step and relieves pressure from your feet. Designed for comfort and style in your bathroom.
NON SLIP & SAFE DESIGN: The strong non-slip rubber backing keeps the bath mat securely in place, reducing the risk of slips or falls after your shower or bath.
ULTRA ABSORBENT & QUICK DRY: Crafted from high-density polyester and memory foam to soak up moisture instantly and dry quickly, keeping your bathroom clean and fresh.
MODERN PEBBLE DESIGN: Elegant pebble stone pattern adds a spa-inspired touch to your bathroom décor. Available in 11 stylish colours to match every interior.
PREMIUM QUALITY & EASY CARE: Made from 100% Polyester, compliant with BS5852 and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 for safety. Includes Bath Mat (50x80cm) & Pedestal Mat (50x40cm). Simply wipe clean or air dry.
description: Product Description 2PC Pebbles Memory Foam Bath & Pedestal Mat Sets EXQUIZIT HOME 2PC Pebbles Memory Foam Bath & Pedestal Mat Sets Non Slip Soft Bathroom Rugs Size: Bath Mat Size: 50 x 80 cm, Pedestal Mat Size: 50 x 40 cm. EXQUIZIT HOME Proudly Presents Memory Foam Bath Set . Size: Bath Mat Size: 50 x 80 cm, Pedestal Mat Size: 50 x 40 cm. This Luxurious 2 Pc Bath & Pedestal Mat Set has a Pattern of Pebble Design, Non Slip Resistant and Water Absorbent. It has the Cushioned Steps which makes sure that your feet are taken care of. The Waterproof Backing restrains water from touching your skin and make you feel uncomfortable. 11 Colours Luxury Memory Foam 2pcs Bath Mat Sets Non Slip Water Absorbent Bathroom Rugs By EXQUIZIT HOME We proudly presents Memory Foam Bath Set in 11 different striking colours to match your bath rooms and to enhance the look. This Luxurious 2 Pc Bath & Pedestal Mat Set has a Pattern of Pebble Design which is Slip Resistant and Water Absorbent. It has the Cushioned Steps which makes sure that your feet are taken care of. The Waterproof Backing restrains water from touching your skin and make you feel uncomfortable. On the other hand, please refer to the instructions in the packing. Size Measurements: Bath Mat: 50 cms x 80 cms Pedestal Mat: 50 cms x 40 cms. Wipe with Dry Cloth. product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Always use on a flat, stable surface. Keep away from heat sources and open flames. Allow the rug to dry completely after each use to prevent mold growth. Do not machine wash. Spot clean only with mild detergent and cool water. Always supervise children and pets around the rug.
